Please enter your full name in the format: First Name, Middle Name (if applicable), then Last Name (e.g., John Michael Smith).

Check Yes or No to indicate your agreement to receive text message updates from Uipath, Inc. regarding your job application. Frequency may vary. Message and data rates may apply. Reply STOP to opt out of future messaging.

If applicable

About Interview Recording

To keep your interview experience seamless and distraction-free, we use an AI Notetaker to record and transcribe our interviews. This helps interviewers focus fully on the conversation and ensures your responses are captured accurately. The recording will only be used internally for evaluation.

I acknowledge that I have read and understood the UiPath Privacy Policy regarding the processing of my personal data for recruitment purposes.

Note: The consent period lasts for 1 year
